metadata.title: Workday HCM/Finance Platform Component Definition
metadata.remarks: OSCAL component definition for Workday HCM and Finance (Financials) deployments. Specifies collection methods, evidence queries, and pass/fail criteria for each WSCC v1.0 / SSCF v1.0 control applicable to Workday. Collection methods: SOAP (WWS v39+), RaaS (REST-based Reports-as-a-Service), REST (Staffing v6), manual questionnaire. All automated collection uses OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials (no WS-Security BasicAuth). ISSG domain permissions are specified per control.

components.title: Workday HCM and Finance Platform
components.description: Workday Human Capital Management (HCM) and/or Workday Financials SaaS deployment assessed against the WSCC v1.0 security control baseline (SSCF sub-profile).
components.purpose: Enterprise HCM, payroll, and financial management SaaS platform.

control-implementations.description: Workday control implementation evidence specifications for WSCC v1.0 / SSCF v1.0.

implemented-requirements.description: MFA enforcement verified via Workday Authentication Policy configuration.

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: MFA_Required=true for all non-ISU user types

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: MFA_Required=false or not configured for human users

implemented-requirements.description: Privileged security group membership and review assessed via Security Group APIs.

props.name: issg-permission
props.value: View Security Groups; View System Users

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: Privileged security groups have documented members with annual certification

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: Security group memberships not reviewed in > 12 months or undocumented members

implemented-requirements.description: SSO configuration verified via Authentication Policy SSO requirement flag.

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: SSO not required OR local password login enabled for human user accounts

implemented-requirements.description: User lifecycle assessed via worker termination workflow and inactive user detection.

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: Terminated workers have disabled Workday accounts within 24 hours of termination date

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: Terminated workers with active Workday accounts > 24 hours post-termination

implemented-requirements.description: ISU (Integration System User) governance assessed via ISU inventory and permission review.

props.name: issg-permission
props.value: View Integration System Users; View API Clients

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: All ISUs have named owners, scoped ISSG permissions, and credential rotation <= 90 days

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: ISUs without owners, with excessive permissions, or credentials not rotated within 90 days

implemented-requirements.description: Session timeout assessed via Workday Session Timeout configuration.

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: Session_Timeout_Minutes > 480 OR session timeout not configured

implemented-requirements.description: Security baseline assessed via Workday tenant security configuration audit.

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: All baseline security settings meet WSCC minimum thresholds (see workday_catalog.json)

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: Any critical baseline control fails assessment threshold

implemented-requirements.description: OAuth API client credential lifecycle assessed via API Client audit.

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: All API clients use OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials; client secrets rotated <= 90 days

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: API clients using deprecated auth methods or client secrets not rotated within policy

implemented-requirements.description: Sensitive HCM data access restricted via business process security policies.

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: Sensitive data business processes restricted to documented security groups

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: Sensitive data BPs accessible to all-users or undocumented security groups

implemented-requirements.description: Data export controls assessed via Workday Report permissions and RaaS access restrictions.

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: Sensitive reports restricted to documented security groups; bulk RaaS access requires ISSG approval

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: Sensitive data reports with open access or no classification

implemented-requirements.description: Security audit logging enabled for authentication, admin, and data access events.

props.name: issg-permission
props.value: Run Security Audit Reports; View Security Log

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: User activity logging enabled; authentication and data access events captured and forwarded to SIEM

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: User activity logging disabled or critical event types not captured

implemented-requirements.description: Admin configuration changes logged via Workday Configuration Change Audit.

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: All security configuration changes logged with actor and timestamp; SIEM alerts configured

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: Configuration changes not logged or SIEM alerts not configured for security changes

implemented-requirements.description: Audit log retention verified via Workday log retention settings and SIEM policy.

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: Workday audit logs retained >= 12 months; SIEM provides >= 36 months cold storage

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: Log retention below minimum regulatory requirement or SIEM cold storage not configured

implemented-requirements.description: Automated threat controls via Workday login restrictions and anomaly policy.

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: IP allowlist or blocklist configured; unmanaged device access restricted or step-up required

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: No login restrictions configured; unrestricted access from any network or device

implemented-requirements.description: Alert triage verified via SIEM alert routing documentation and SOC SLA evidence.

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: Documented SOC runbook for Workday alerts; MTTA for critical alerts <= 15 minutes

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: No documented alert SLA or Workday alerts not routed to SOC queue

implemented-requirements.description: Exception governance assessed via risk register and exception approval documentation.

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: All active exceptions have dual approval, compensating controls, and expiry dates < 12 months

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: Exceptions without expiry dates, unapproved exceptions, or no risk register entry
